seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is being evaluated for kidney stones after referral from their primary care provider
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: About a week ago the patient developed sudden onset pain in the right back while working in a barn moving hay
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient initially thought the right back pain was from throwing hay
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: At the time of onset of back pain the patient broke out into a sweat
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: At the time of onset of back pain the patient became very nauseated
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: After developing pain the patient went to see their doctor
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The prior doctor ordered a CT scan for the patient
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The prior doctor told the patient that the CT scan showed a kidney stone
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports never having had a kidney stone before this episode
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports that their father has had kidney stones in the past
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: During the episode the patient's right back pain radiated almost down to the groin
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The pain did not radiate all the way down to the groin
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Since the initial episode the patient has not had more pain in the right back area
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: After learning they had a kidney stone the patient had recurrent pain episodes a couple of times
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The recurrent pain episodes after diagnosis did not last as long as the initial episode
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been straining their urine using a provided cup
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not seen any stone material in the urine strainer
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not noticed their urine being darker than usual
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient does not report visible blood in the urine
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states the patient's vital signs look good
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician reports no fever on examination
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician reports the patient's blood pressure is normal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician reports the patient's heart rate is normal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On abdominal exam there is no tenderness to palpation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On abdominal exam there is no rebound tenderness
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On abdominal exam there is no guarding
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: There is right-sided costovertebral angle tenderness on exam
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician explains that the right CVA tenderness suggests inflammation over the kidney
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician attributes the kidney inflammation to the known kidney stone
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician reviewed the patient's CT scan results
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The CT scan shows a 0.5 cm stone in the proximal right ureter
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The CT scan shows no evidence of hydronephrosis
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician diagnoses the patient with a right ureteral kidney stone
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician recommends the patient increase fluid intake to help pass the stone
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will prescribe oxycodone 5 mg every 6 to 8 hours for pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician advises the patient to continue taking Tylenol between oxycodone doses for breakthrough pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient already has a urine strainer
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician instructs the patient to continue using the urine strainer until the stone passes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will order a basic metabolic panel
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will order a urinalysis
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will order a urine culture
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The purpose of the urinalysis is to determine if antibiotics are needed for infection
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to prescribe antibiotics only if urinalysis suggests infection
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician wants to see the patient back in about one to two weeks
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician hopes the patient will have passed the stone within one to two weeks
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: If the stone has not passed in one to two weeks the clinician will discuss further treatment options
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: One potential future treatment discussed is lithotripsy to break up the stone with shock waves
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician describes lithotripsy as a not very invasive procedure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient agrees with the proposed plan of care
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will send a nurse in with the oxycodone prescription
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
